About.title: Our Heritage
About.subtitle: Preserving the legacy of fine tobacco since 1995.
About.tradition_text1: Welcome to CigarLounge, where passion meets precision. Founded over three decades ago by a collective of aficionados, we established this sanctuary with a singular mission: to curate the world's finest cigars for the discerning smoker.
About.tradition_text2: We believe that a cigar is not just a product, but an experience—a pause in time where craftsmanship and flavor converge. From the fertile soils of Pinar del Río to the volcanic richness of Nicaragua, our selection represents the pinnacle of agricultural and artisanal achievement.
About.humidor_text: Our state-of-the-art humidor ensures every cigar is kept at optimal humidity and temperature.
About.quote: If I cannot smoke cigars in Heaven, I shall not go.

Hero.title: Experience True Luxury
Hero.subtitle: Discover the world's finest hand-rolled cigars, curated for the modern gentleman.
Hero.recommendations_subtitle: Based on your past preferences of Cohiba and Full Body profiles.
Hero.join_text: Earn points on every purchase, access exclusive humidors, and get invited to private tasting events.
Hero.who_we_are_text: Welcome to our exclusive lounge, where heritage meets exceptional craftsmanship. We are dedicated to providing connoisseurs with an unparalleled selection of premium cigars, hand-rolled by master artisans using the finest aged tobaccos from around the world. Whether you are a seasoned aficionado or embarking on your very first smoke, our curated collections guarantee a profound experience in every puff.

Shop.title: Our Collection
Shop.subtitle: Explore our premium selection of cigars and accessories.
Shop.no_products: Our humidor doesn't seem to have that vitola currently. Would you like a personal recommendation from our curator?

Footer.about_us_short: Experience the finest hand-rolled cigars and premium accessories. Delivered with care to true aficionados.
